notes: Page views = listing detail page views on jamesedition.com
Inquiries = contact form submissions delivered to offices
active_listings = unique listings that received at least 1 page view in April (proxy for total inventory)
inquiries_per_listing = inquiries / active_listings (comparable to Tableau 'Leads per Listing')
Traffic split = which countries are viewing listings in this market (top 10, by PV share %)
Subscription tiers: freemium (free), elite (paid tier 1), elite_plus (paid tier 2, highest)
Multipliers show how many x more inquiries per listing elite/elite_plus get vs freemium
Region-level data includes PV and inquiry splits but not per-listing rates (country level only)

regions.name: Andalusia (incl. Costa del Sol, Marbella, Malaga)
